prompt:
A two-wheel line-following robot sits on a clean white work surface with a strip of matte black tape curving beneath its front sensors. At the nose of the chassis, two or three downward-facing IR reflectance sensors are mounted on a small bracket, angled slightly toward the floor so their emitters and receivers are clearly visible. Thin wires run from the sensors to a compact microcontroller board on top of the robot, beside a small battery pack strapped to the frame. The wheels are modest in size with a rear caster for balance, and the robot looks mid-calibration with a multimeter probe or USB cable nearby.

Background: a tidy hobby lab with soft, even lighting, organized parts bins, and a subtle solarpunk touch like a small potted plant. Photorealistic 512x512 render with gently stylized colors, no logos or text, and the composition centered on the sensors hovering above the contrasting black track.
